title: Prime Minister Siliņa flies to Greece and Cyprus on Thursday
summary_full: Latvian Prime Minister Evika Siliņa continues a period of intense jet-setting diplomacy on April 23rd with a very brief visit to Greece, where she will meet with her Greek counterpart Kyriakos Mitsotakis at 09:30 at the Maximos Mansion.
